primary.name: HSBC Red
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Brand Identity, Critical Alerts

gradients.note: Strictly flat colors. No gradients. Use opacity/alpha for depth.

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Relaxed but precise. Use gap-6 for layout, gap-2 for data.

sidebar.style: Dark (bg-[#2D2D2D] text-white) or Light (bg-white border-r border-gray-200). Recommended: Light for better readability in data-heavy apps.

buttons.primary: bg-[#DB0011] hover:bg-[#B3000E] text-white rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2 shadow-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-900 rounded-sm font-medium px-6 py-2 shadow-sm transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-white border-gray-300 focus:border-[#DB0011] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#DB0011] rounded-sm h-10 px-3
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1.5 block

status_badges.style: Outline style preferred for density. rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border

tables.style: Dense, distinct headers. Header bg: bg-gray-50. Row hover: hover:bg-gray-50/50. Border-b for all rows.

navigation.branding: HSBC Logo (Red Hexagon + Text) at top left

visual_enhancers.the_red_line: Use a 2px solid red top border (border-t-2 border-t-[#DB0011]) on active cards or the main header to reinforce brand identity.
visual_enhancers.the_paper_trail: For the Receipt View, simulate a physical paper document. White container, centered, shadow-md, print-friendly layout.
visual_enhancers.data_density: Use compact spacing. Avoid massive whitespace in data tables. Use 'group' and 'peer' classes for hover effects across rows.

assets.logo_construction: Use a Hexagon Icon (from lucide-react) filled with #DB0011, adjacent to 'HSBC' text in a bold serif or sans-serif font.
assets.icons: lucide-react (Clean, standard). Use stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look.

images.description: Modern skyscraper abstract, professional and trustworthy.
Subtle architectural detail for visual break.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION: Use React (JS) + Tailwind. Do not use TSX.
2. BRANDING: The 'HSBC Red' (#DB0011) is powerful. Use it sparingly for primary actions and key highlights. Do not overuse it.
3. FONTS: Import 'IBM Plex Sans' and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts immediately in index.css.
4. LAYOUT: The Dashboard must be dense. Use the 'Bento Grid Mode B'.
5. DATA: The 'Transaction Receipt' view is the core feature. It must look like a digital twin of a physical SWIFT document.
6. NAVIGATION: Use a persistent Sidebar. Active state should have a red left border or red text.
7. TABLES: Use Shadcn Table. Enable sorting and filtering.
8. CHARTS: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts wrapper) for 'Transaction Volume' and 'Settlement Status'. Colors: Red, Black, Grey.
9. UETR: Always display UETR in 'JetBrains Mono' font for readability.
10. COMPLIANCE: Add 'Confidential' or 'Internal Use Only' watermarks/badges where appropriate.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Black on White is safe. White on Red (#DB0011) is safe for large text/buttons.
